name: Reminder
tagline: Fires exact-time alarms that ring and vibrate even from a locked screen.
about: Reminder behaves like an alarm clock, not a gentle notification nudge -- built for things you can't afford to miss. It rings and vibrates on a full-screen lock-screen alarm, offers Complete, Dismiss, and Snooze actions right from that screen, and supports daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly repeat rules with category organization. Sign in with Google to sync reminders and attached photos across devices via Drive.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.

screenshots.alt: Home screen with greeting, today/overdue/this-week counts, and the tab bar
New reminder editor with priority, category, Date & Time or Location trigger, and repeat rule
Settings screen with reminder tone, ring-in-silent, time format, and alarm behavior

name: Cards
tagline: Offline, biometric-locked vault for your credit and debit cards.
about: Cards scans the front and back of your credit and debit cards, extracts the details with on-device OCR, and stores both the structured data and the encrypted card images in a fully encrypted, biometric-locked local vault. There is no cloud, no account, and no analytics -- the app makes exactly one network call, ever: an optional, user-initiated check for a new version. CVV is never stored by default.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.

name: AI Scanner
tagline: Finds anything in your screenshots with on-device AI summaries and semantic search.
about: AI Scanner automatically finds new screenshots on your phone, extracts their text with on-device OCR, and writes an on-device AI summary for each one -- so you can later search by meaning ("headache medicine") and not just literal words. You can also share links into it, which get captured and summarized the same way. Every model runs entirely on-device (Gemma 3 1B for summaries, Gecko for search embeddings) -- there is no cloud, no account, and no analytics. This is an early pre-release: expect rough edges.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time. Large download (~950MB) -- the on-device AI models are bundled in the app so it works fully offline after install.

name: MirrorDrive
tagline: Two-way folder sync between your phone and Google Drive, on your schedule.
about: MirrorDrive pairs a folder on your phone with a folder on Google Drive and keeps them in sync -- two-way, upload-only, or download-only, your choice per mapping. Sync runs on a schedule in the background (interval or a fixed daily time, with Wi-Fi-only and charging-only options) or on demand, with a per-mapping file browser, categorized sync history, and a Duplicate files screen that finds byte-identical copies across all your mappings so you can review and clean them up. Built-in audio and video playback for anything synced. Uses Google's restricted drive.file scope -- MirrorDrive only ever sees files and folders it created or that you explicitly picked, never your whole Drive.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.

name: TwinClean
tagline: Finds exact duplicate files and lets you clean them safely.
about: TwinClean scans your device for exact duplicate files across photos, videos, audio and documents, grouping every match so you can review before cleaning. Every match is verified with a full SHA-256 checksum over the whole file -- identical content is the only thing that matches, never "similar looking" -- and Smart Select keeps the newest, best copy by default. Every file can be opened directly from the app to double-check before cleaning, and each duplicate group shows the exact evidence used to match it (size, checksum, byte-for-byte comparison). Cleaning moves files to an in-app Trash (restorable for 30 days) with single-file, whole-group, or restore-everything options, never deletes originals outright. Sign in with Google (optional) to also find and clean exact duplicates in your own Google Drive, matched on Drive's checksum and moved to Drive's own Trash -- your account is never required for the core on-device feature. The app checks for new versions on launch and installs updates directly in-app.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.

name: Local Sender
tagline: Send messages and files between your devices on the same Wi-Fi, end-to-end encrypted.
about: Local Sender lets your devices talk directly over the same Wi-Fi with no internet, cloud, or account. Discover nearby devices, pair by confirming a matching 6-digit code on both screens, then chat one-to-one or in group rooms and send any file. Everything is end-to-end encrypted with a signed X25519 handshake and AES-256-GCM, and files are checksum-verified on arrival. Conversations and paired devices are scoped per Wi-Fi network and switch automatically as you move between them.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Both devices must be on the same Wi-Fi network. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.
